title: Billing
description: Review plan details, subscription status, and recent invoices.

empty.title: Billing is not active for this shop
empty.description: The account is reachable, but no subscription or invoice state is available yet.

unavailable.title: Billing is not available
unavailable.description: Plan details for this shop could not be loaded. Try reloading, or open Billing from your account menu.

plan.plansDescription: Choose a plan for this shop. You only pay when you select a paid plan.
plan.noPaymentRequired: No payment is required for this shop.
plan.scheduledChange: Changes to {name} on {date}. No refund for remaining days. You can cancel before then.

starter.tagline: Everything you need to run your shop online.

growth.tagline: Prepaid plan for shops ready to invest in scale.

payment.checkingDescription: If you finished checkout, confirmation can take a moment. Use Pay again only if the charge did not complete.
payment.receivedThrough: Your paid plan is active through {date}.
payment.requiredDescription: Pay to activate or extend your plan.

hint.onStarterSelectGrowth: You are on Starter. Select Growth to continue payment for the upgrade.
hint.alreadyOnPlan: You are already on this plan.
hint.finishPayment: Finish payment to activate or extend this plan.
hint.scheduledKeep: A switch to {name} is scheduled. Keep this plan to cancel it.
hint.endingSoon: Your current period is ending soon. Renew to stay on this plan.
hint.periodEnded: Your paid period has ended. Renew to continue on this plan.
hint.alreadyScheduled: Already scheduled. You stay on {current} until {date}.
hint.noRefundKeepUntil: No refund. You keep {current} until {date}, then move to {next}.
hint.switchNowPeriodEnded: Switch to {name} now. Your paid period has already ended.
hint.completeOrContinue: Complete payment for the open invoice, or continue to confirm this plan.
hint.chargedForMonth: You will be charged {price} for one month after payment.

toast.nowOnFree: You are now on the free plan.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.empty: No invoices have been recorded yet.
